chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Federal Excise Reference Applications 186 & 187 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA 1138/2024. 2. For hearing of CMA 1257/2014. 3. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025 This reference is pending since 2014 without any progress. Even today, the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification; therefore, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. Vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Office to place a copy hereof in connected matter. Judge Judge M. Khan
